---
title: "SDC Platinum"
page-layout: article
---

# SDC Platinum

## Description

Transaction database covering new issues, bonds, syndicated loans, mergers and acquisitions, governance, private equity, and infrastructure. Supports corporate finance and deal research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Request Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Available by request on LSEG Workpsace or WRDS.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/Workspace/SDC)
- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVURVFZWTdNSkxNR1JZV01ITjdPWElHUEo3SCQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
